title: Oil gains amid tightening supplies
summary:
Main
Increasing expectations of a Fed rate cut kept market sentiment positive last week. Weakness in the USD supported investor appetite. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-07-08 102150.png | assets/2024-07-08_oil-gains-amid-tightening-supplies_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_3fee7321f434.png

Market Commentary
Brent crude oil rallied lasts week on geopolitical tensions and falling inventories that kept market sentiment buoyant.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Increasing expectations of a Fed rate cut kept market sentiment positive last week. Weakness in the USD supported investor appetite.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Brent crude oil rallied lasts week on geopolitical tensions and falling inventories that kept market sentiment buoyant. US oil inventories fell by 12mbbl against expectations of 0.9mbbl.
